burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate to high due to heart failure and arrhythmias

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Echocardiography showing LV dilation and reduced EF; evaluate ischemic and secondary causes; cardiac MRI when indicated

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: Hundreds of thousands across the EU
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with guideline-directed therapy and device access

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Echo and MRI widely available in cardiology services
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Guideline-directed HF therapy, ICD/CRT, transplant or LVAD in advanced cases
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong cardiology networks and access to advanced therapies
